segments.text: How long, Lord? Will you forget me forever? How long will you hide your face from me?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: How long must I wrestle with my thoughts and day after day have sorrow in my heart? How long will my enemy triumph over me?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Look on me and answer, Lord my God. Give light to my eyes, or I will sleep in death,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: and my foes will rejoice when I fall.
But I trust in your unfailing love; my heart rejoices in your salvation.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will sing the Lord's praise, for he has been good to me.
segments.speaker: David
